articles.title: 2026 World Cup European playoffs: Live updates, highlights, reaction - ESPN
articles.description: Sixteen European teams are vying for four spots at this summer's 2026 FIFA World Cup. Follow live here!
articles.content:
Mar 26, 2026, 12:52 PM ET
The final spots for the 2026 FIFA World Cup will be decided this month. In Europe, several matches will determine which teams are one step closer to qualifying for this sum… [+350 chars]
